docket_entries.description: DECLARATION TO RESET HEARING DATE FOR TRAVELING (CLAIM NOT SERVED YET). FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIDGEWAY, MARNIE
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-27-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-27-2026 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-06-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $85.00 AS TO DEFENDANT YUN, HAOYU
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,038.50 FILED BY RIDGEWAY, MARNIE AS TO DEFENDANT YUN, HAOYU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES CHANG. PLAINTIFF MARNIE RIDGEWAY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HAOYU YUN IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY RIDGEWAY, MARNIE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIDGEWAY, MARNIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YUN, HAOYU $1,788.50 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,923.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
